entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Feral Druid DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Keep Mark of the Wild , Thorns , and Omen of Clarity (once talented at level 61) applied.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Feral Druid DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Pull mob with Faerie Fire (Feral) from a distance.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Feral Druid DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use Mangle (Cat) repeatedly, waiting for Energy ticks when needed.

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Feral Druid DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: If you have 5 Combo Points and your target is not yet dead, then use Ferocious Bite .

entries.section: Leveling Rotation for Feral Druid DPS in Burning Crusade
entries.text: Use Lifebloom , Regrowth , and/or Rejuvenation when low on health.

entries.section: Best Leveling Consumables for Feral Druid DPS in TBC Classic

sections.heading: Best Leveling Consumables for Feral Druid DPS in TBC Classic

entries.text: Do the entire Bear Form quest chain, starting with Heeding the Call / Heeding the Call as soon as you hit level 10.

Likewise, don't wait to complete the Travel Form quest chain, even if you don't find many uses for it when questing on land in most zones. Many Druids sleep on this until they reach a high level, but they regret it when executing the occasional underwater quest.

As much as possible, plan your leveling route so that you are fighting mobs that are 1-2 levels lower than you. Since Feral Druids should optimize for sustainability with no downtime, lower-level mobs are a much more efficient source of experience than equal or higher-level mobs, which will force you to heal up more frequently.
When completing quest objectives, you can often use Prowl to bypass a ton of difficult mobs that would otherwise take a significant amount of time to clear. .

You can often solo quests that are intended for groups by killing Elite mobs without any help. Even though you will be questing primarily in Cat Form, you can swap to Bear Form in these situations and simply outlast the Elite with your massive armor and health pool. You will inevitably get low on HP at some point when doing this, but you can then use Bash to stun the enemy long enough to pop out of form and heal up.
